_comment: Copy this file to your repo root as 'vanguard-usecase.json' and fill in each field.
_id_comment: REQUIRED. Unique kebab-case identifier. Used as the filename in the gallery (your-tool-name.json). No spaces, lowercase only.
_order_comment: REQUIRED. Integer that controls display position in the carousel. Lower numbers appear first. Use multiples of 10 to leave room for reordering.
title: Your Tool Name
_title_comment: REQUIRED. Short display name shown on the card (e.g. 'RFP Copilot').
_tag_comment: REQUIRED. Category badge shown on the card image (e.g. 'Knowledge ops', 'Sales enablement', 'Operations', 'Productivity', 'Data science', 'Legal & risk').
_icon_comment: REQUIRED. Phosphor icon class for the category badge. Browse icons at https://phosphoricons.com — use the class name prefixed with 'ph-' (e.g. 'ph-chart-line-up').
_repo_comment: REQUIRED. Full URL to the GitHub repository. The card links here.
description: One or two sentences describing what the tool does and who benefits from it.
_description_comment: REQUIRED. Shown as the body text on the card. Keep it under 200 characters for best layout.
_benefits_comment: REQUIRED. Exactly 3 short bullet strings. Start with a verb or number. These are the three reasons someone would want this tool.
_stack_comment: REQUIRED. Concise tech stack shown at the bottom of the card. Separate items with ' · ' (space-dot-space).
_href_comment: OPTIONAL. Internal gallery page path (e.g. 'sap-blog-tracker.html'). Only set this if your tool has a dedicated page inside the vanguard-gallery site. Leave null otherwise.
_image_comment: OPTIONAL but recommended. Local filename of a preview image committed to your repo root (e.g. 'preview.png' or 'docs/preview.png'). The push-to-gallery workflow uploads it to the gallery and rewrites this field automatically. Recommended size: 800x600px. Supports PNG, JPG, SVG, WebP. Do NOT use raw.githubusercontent.com URLs — they return 404 for private repos. If omitted the card uses a generated SVG illustration.
_palette_comment: OPTIONAL. Custom colours for the SVG art fallback. Only used if 'image' is null. Provide an object with 'bg' (background), 'shape', and 'accent' hex values.
_art_comment: OPTIONAL. Named SVG art template to use when no image is provided. Valid values: 'sap', 'rfp', 'process', 'meeting', 'forecast', 'contract', 'gallery'. If omitted a plain coloured background from 'palette' is used.
